text: As I step into this brightly lit, modern hallway and peer through the glass at the vibrant, glowing R+D lab, I feel an immediate sense of curiosity and anticipation. The blue neon light and sleek, organized space beyond the threshold evoke a feeling of stepping into a futuristic workshop, a sanctuary where imagination and invention come alive. Surrounded by symbols of preparedness like the fire hose and extinguishers, I also feel a reassuring sense of safety—a well-equipped environment where experimentation flourishes. In this moment, I am both cautious observer and eager participant, pulled forward by the promise of discovery and creation.
